ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). All sanctions previously imposed on Denta Tadesse for failure to appear at the OSC hearings are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Denta Tadesse telephone number 415-304-6130 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Mr. Tadesse explained why he does not agree with the Attorney's reasons for withdrawing. Upon conclusion, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTORNEY SHAWN RIDGELL, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DENTA TADESSE is granted. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
